changes.summary: Flow dependency resolution and depends_on generation are more reliable when add_depends_on is enabled, particularly during concurrent export processing.
Dependency lists are merged and written into exported configuration only when valid dependency metadata is returned.
When TF_LOG is enabled, dependency resolution and depends_on generation emit additional diagnostic messages, including warnings for invalid or unresolved dependency references.

related_export_changes.summary: Exported managed resources that participate in flow dependency resolution may include more complete or consistent depends_on blocks.
